summary: Tested new image upload/get/delete endpoints, updated property counts (21 curated + 582 inventory), regression for leads/properties/chat, admin panel image upload UI, and image optimization (loading/fetchpriority) attrs across hero & card pages. All 13 backend tests pass; admin upload flow works end-to-end; image optimization attrs verified on Home, About, FlagshipListing, PropertyDetail (eager+high) and CrexiListings/Blog (lazy).
action_items: Optional: previous /app/backend/tests/test_properties_api.py is now stale (still hard-codes 587 total and 5 curated). Recommend updating or deleting it to avoid future regression confusion.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/images.py oversize check happens AFTER full file is read into memory — for very large uploads this could consume significant RAM. Consider streaming/size pre-check via Content-Length header for hardening (non-blocking).
seed_data_creation: None — used test images generated in-memory via Pillow; uploaded images are deleted by tests after each upload.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_images_and_properties.py. They rely on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var — export from frontend/.env before running. Old test_properties_api.py expects 587 total/5 curated which is now stale (current is 603 total / 21 curated / 582 inventory).

verified_features.POST /api/upload-image PNG: PASS — RGBA PNG accepted, served back as image/jpeg
verified_features.GET /api/images/{id}: PASS — bytes returned with content-type image/jpeg + X-Image-Width/Height headers
verified_features.Admin Add Property modal upload UI: PASS — Upload button visible, file input wired
